title: Pleroma martiusianum
taxonomy: Pleroma martiusianum is classified within the family Pleromaceae. This family, along with the genus Pleroma, is part of the order Malpighiales. The order Malpighiales is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Within the angiosperms, Pleroma martiusianum can be further classified as belonging to the clade of flowering plants in the dicotyledonous group. The classification of Pleroma martiusianum continues to be studied and refined in the scientific community.
